data.body: Extends epic 8df3-61d0 (closed) and 07cb-5477 (closed). Root cause analysis: brainstorm's scrutiny pipeline validates internal consistency but not external completeness when epics modify shared artifacts. Related epics: 1f67-e7b2 (Jira bridge LINK sync), b555-bac6 (sprint drift + brainstorm suggestion follow-on).
